title: Manuscript on Desk
caption: The work begins with prose: rooms, errands, animals, forms, and recurring physical detail.

title: Exile as Interface
caption: The work does not describe exile. It makes exile navigable.

title: Nine Houses
caption: The manuscript is distributed across houses rather than chapters.

title: Entry Fragment
caption: The emotional stakes arrive through voice before mechanics.

title: Temporal Debt Ledger
caption: Movement through the text has metabolic cost.

title: Möbius Engine
caption: Returning to the same place does not guarantee the same reality.

title: Face A / Face B
caption: The stable surface flips into its underside.

title: Typographic Shatter
caption: Accumulated debt physically damages the reading surface.

title: Form 404
caption: The system files what it cannot retrieve.

title: SparrowOS Marker
caption: Surveillance enters the narrative as a bureaucratic animal.

title: Interface Walkthrough
caption: The current prototype demonstrates nonlinear entry, return, and state change; a public walkthrough remains in development.

title: Reader Journey Map
caption: The reader’s movement becomes part of the manuscript.

title: Ordinary Presence
caption: Domestic detail and dry humor keep the manuscript alive beyond its administrative and computational structures.

title: HAIG PAPAZIAN / ROLE
caption: Author and interaction designer working across prose, hypertext structure, interface memory, and state-change logic.
body: Manuscript | Narrative structure | Hypertext architecture | Interaction logic

title: Relation to Cartography / DERIVE / MEKENA
caption: Literary exile becomes administrative fiction, memory retrieval, and physical shelter.

title: Animal / Room / Light
caption: The system stops in ordinary life, not resolution.
